revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Category:Art schools in Japan]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Category:Art schools in Japan]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '日本の美術系教育機関に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソート:ひしゆつきよういくきかん}} [[Category:日本の美術教育]]...'
revision.text:
日本の美術系教育機関に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:ひしゆつきよういくきかん}} [[Category:日本の美術教育]] [[Category:美術系教育機関|＊にほん]]

revision.comment: sort
revision.text:
日本の美術系教育機関に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:ひしゆつきよういくきかん}} [[Category:日本の美術教育]] [[Category:美術系教育機関|*にほん]]

日本の美術系教育機関に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:ひしゆつきよういくきかん}} [[Category:日本の美術教育]] [[Category:美術系教育機関|*にほん]] [[Category:日本の養成学校]]

revision.comment: [[WP:WDATA#言語間リンク|Wikidataの言語間リンク]]に重複

revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|教育|教育機関|美術系教育機関}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|文化|…|美術|美術教育|日本の美術教育}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|学校|養成学校|日本の養成学校}}
{{Commonscat}} 日本の[[アート]] ([[芸術]]・[[美術]])系教育機関に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソート:ひしゆつきよういくきかん}} [[Category:日本の美術教育]] [[Category:美術系教育機関|*にほん]] [[Category:日本の養成学校]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]][[category:Categories created from enwiki title]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] <!--this is here to get the bot to work--> "
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
revision.text:
==English Content== {{CatAutoTOC}}
{{Commons category|Art schools in Japan}} This category is meant to encompass educational institutions in Japan which focus on the arts. For groupings of artist by style, see [[:Category:Schools of Japanese art]].
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 5 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 5 Categories]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[ar:Category:تصنيف:مدارس الفنون في اليابان]] [[ar:Category:مدارس الفنون في اليابان]] [[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[commons:Category:Art schools in Japan]] [[commons:Category:Category:Art schools in Japan]] [[de:Category:Kategorie:Kunsthochschule in Japan]] [[de:Category:Kunsthochschule in Japan]] [[en:Category:Art schools in Japan]] [[en:Category:Category:Art schools in Japan]] [[fr:Category:Catégorie:École d'art au Japon]] [[fr:Category:École d'art au Japon]] [[ja:Category:Category:日本の美術系教育機関]] [[ja:Category:日本の美術系教育機関]] [[ko:Category:분류:일본의 미술 학교]] [[ko:Category:일본의 미술 학교]] [[pl:Category:Kategoria:Uczelnie artystyczne w Japonii]] [[pl:Category:Uczelnie artystyczne w Japonii]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:日本の美術大学]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں آرٹ اسکول]] [[ur:Category:زمرہ:جاپان میں آرٹ اسکول]]

==English Content== {{CatAutoTOC}}
{{Commons category|Art schools in Japan}} This category is meant to encompass educational institutions in Japan which focus on the arts. For groupings of artist by style, see [[:Category:Schools of Japanese art]]. revision.text:
==English Content== {{CatAutoTOC}}
{{Commons category|Art schools in Japan}} This category is meant to encompass educational institutions in Japan which focus on the arts. For groupings of artist by style, see [[:Category:Schools of Japanese art]].
